/usr/bin/g++ -g CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/atlas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/animation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/collision_box.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/manager/resource_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/manager/collision_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/manager/state_machine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/manager/character_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/manager/bullet_time_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/character.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/player/player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/enemy/enemy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/player/player_state_node.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/enemy/sword.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/enemy/barb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/game.dir/src/enemy/enemy_state_node.cpp.o -o /home/simo/code/game_project/KDQS/bin/game-Linux  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2_image.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2_mixer.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2_ttf.so
